cockpit.blocker_title: P0 BLOCKER — DGSFP Registration unverified publicly
cockpit.blocker_body: BdE list of Malta insurers (18-Mar-2026) does not include VUMI Insurance Europe Limited. Verify with DGSFP before activating broker channel or media.

audiences.headline: LatAm Diaspora in Spain — 1.09M+
audiences.subtitle: Verified data: INE Annual Census 2025, OPI/MITES, SJM. VUMI target: HNW and upper-middle-class professionals with premium private insurance propensity.
audiences.chart_note: Source: INE Annual Census 2025 (30 Apr 2025) · OPI · Figures = registered nationality; country-of-birth totals are ~50–60% higher.

competitors.headline: IPMI Competitors — Spain
competitors.subtitle: Correct peer set: international EEA IPMI insurers. The incorrect peer set is the 5 major Spanish domestic insurers — they do not compete in premium expat IPMI.
competitors.radar_note: Scale 1–5. VUMI leads on LATAM focus and coverage. Risk: Spain visa eligibility pending DGSFP confirmation.
competitors.table_note: Source: official corporate pages, Apr 2026. Pricing: mystery-shopping pending.

signals.subtitle: Real-time feed of regulatory, competitive, demographic and market signals. Relevance ≥70.
signals.no_data: Data not available in current dataset.

brokers.headline: Spain Broker Shortlist
brokers.subtitle_pre: brokers in database + additional corpus intelligence (doc 06). Ranked by composite fit score: expat/HNW specialisation, LatAm focus, current IPMI carriers, P0/P1 geographic coverage.

geography.headline: Launch Priority by City
geography.subtitle: 10 cities ranked by LatAm concentration, broker density, HNW presence and private health penetration. P0 = immediate; P3 = monitor for future expansion.

proposition.headline: Differentiation & Messages
proposition.subtitle: Based on verified corpus data Wave 1. The three Euro Health plans were launched 17-Mar-2026 from VUMI Insurance Europe Limited (MFSA Malta C 112852).
proposition.counter_title: Why would a broker prefer Allianz Care over VUMI?

roadmap.headline: Launch Plan — Spain
roadmap.subtitle: 5 gates: 30 / 60 / 90 / 180 / 365 days. Each gate has an exit criterion, owner and blockers.

ask.headline: Ask VUMI
ask.subtitle: RAG over the full corpus — 109 chunks from 28 verified documents. Cites source slugs and chunk indices.
